reason: fix verified: For each pgrep line, the patched parser first requires the worker-address argument, then skips the line when _WORKER_BIN_RE does not match cmdline; only after that gate does it extract the address and append the worker tuple, so the dscli stop line with -worker_address= but no datasystem_worker token is skipped while the real /opt/ds/datasystem_worker line is appended. (issue #176)
